title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 359.621
text:
359.621.  Title. — This act* may be cited as the "Missouri Revised Uniform Limited Partnership Act".
(L. 1985 H.B. 512 & 650) 
Effective 1-01-87 
*"This act" (H.B. 512 & 650, 1985) contained numerous sections. Consult Disposition of Sections table for a definitive listing.
